steps.title: Set up
steps.content: We need P(Site A | Red maple): given a tree is a red maple, what is the probability it comes from Site A? The condition restricts the denominator to red maples only.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: From the table: red maples at Site A = 35, total red maples = 50. So P(Site A | Red maple) = 35/50 = 7/10 = 0.7.
